message:
🌱 Add missing governance files per CNCF audit (#93)

Addresses #92 — CNCF and CI Audit - week of Mar 9 2026

- Add _typos.toml (typos-cli config with standard false positives)
- Add .prowlabels.yaml (Prow label configuration)
- Move CODEOWNERS from repo root to .github/ (standard location)
- Update .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.yml to match template

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@ body:
         Thank you for suggesting an improvement! Please fill in the details below.
 
         Before opening a new feature request, please check
-        [existing issues](https://github.com/llm-d/llm-d-infra/issues)
+        [existing issues](https://github.com/llm-d/{{PROJECT_NAME}}/issues)
         to see if a similar request already exists.
 
   - type: textarea

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+# Labels for labeling issues and pull requests using GitHub prow action.
+kind:
+  - 'bug'
+  - 'security'
+  - 'feature'
+  - 'docs'
+
+priority:
+  - 'p0'
+  - 'p1'
+  - 'p2'

@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+# Typos configuration
+# https://github.com/crate-ci/typos
+
+[default.extend-words]
+# Azure Kubernetes Service abbreviation
+AKS = "AKS"
+aks = "aks"
+# Indian Standard Time / Istio abbreviation
+IST = "IST"
+# Abbreviation (e.g., 2nd -> ND)
+ND = "ND"
+
+# Add repo-specific false positives here:
+# word = "word"
